Class PaymentController

java.lang.Object
logicControllers.PaymentController
public class PaymentController extends Object
Controller class responsible for handling the payment process within the restaurant. It manages bill creation, calculates discounts for subscribers, and updates table availability upon successful payment.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final BillDAO
    billdb
    Data access object for bill-related database operations.

    Data access object for reservation-related database operations.
    private final TableDAO

  • Constructor Details

      public PaymentController()
      Initializes a new PaymentController and instantiates the required DAOs for bills, reservations, and tables.

  • Method Details

    • addPayment

      public PaymentResult addPayment(Bill bill)
      Processes a payment for a specific bill. This method checks if the bill was already paid, applies a 10% discount if the customer is a subscriber, saves the bill to the database, and frees the associated table.
      Parameters:
      bill - The Bill entity containing payment details such as amount and reservation ID.
      Returns:
      A PaymentResult object indicating success or failure, a descriptive message, and the updated Bill object.
